---
title: "FLORA PubPeer - author emails"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

pacman::p_load(chromote, rvest, dplyr, stringr, httr,tidyverse,readr)
```

## Load the converter

```{r}
source("flora_converter.R")
source("scrape_emails.R")
```

# load data convert
```{r}

data <- csv_to_flora_json("flora.csv")
df   <- flora_json_to_df(data)

# Fix encoding immediately after loading
df <- df |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), \(x) iconv(x, from = "latin1", to = "UTF-8", sub = " "))) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), \(x) str_replace_all(x, "[^\x01-\x7F]", "-"))) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), \(x) str_replace_all(x, "\\s+", " "))) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), \(x) trimws(x)))
 
# clean up FLoRA
# remove uninformative and APA ref NAs
table(df$outcome)
df <- df %>% filter(outcome!= "unclear") %>% filter(outcome != "uninformative")
df <- df %>% filter(!(is.na(apa_ref_r)))

sample_doi <- sample(df$doi_o,50)

sample_df <- df %>% filter(doi_o %in% sample_doi)

View(sample_df)

```

#email function
```{r}
email_res <- purrr::map(sample_df$doi_o, purrr::possibly(get_email_main, otherwise = NULL)) %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows()


###
# Step 1: direct GET
response <- httr::GET("https://doi.org/10.1038/nature01930", 
                      httr::add_headers("User-Agent" = "Mozilla/5.0"))
response$status_code

page <- rvest::read_html(httr::content(response, "text"))

# check mailto links
page %>% rvest::html_nodes("a[href^='mailto']") %>% rvest::html_attr("href")

# check cloudflare-protected emails
page %>% rvest::html_nodes("a[href*='email-protection#']") %>% rvest::html_attr("href")


get_email_main("10.1038/nature01930", debug_if_none = FALSE)


results <- purrr::map(sample_df$doi_o, purrr::possibly(
  \(doi) get_email_main(doi, debug_if_none = FALSE),
  otherwise = tibble::tibble(url = NA_character_, emails = NA_character_, extraction_method = NA_character_)
)) %>%
  dplyr::bind_rows()

```
